detail: init objective="Issue #180 (https://github.com/lidge-jun/opencodex/issues/180): close the GUI-CLI feature gap for multi-account and API-key pool management in OpenCodex. (1) Write a durable devlog unit devlog/_plan/260720_issue180_cli_account_parity/ containing a complete GUI-feature-vs-CLI-coverage survey (000-range research) plus diff-level decade docs for every implementation phase, produced with sol explorer/reviewer subagents (LOOP-DOCS-FIRST-01 docs-only first cycle). (2) Implement the surveyed CLI parity gaps via one PABCD cycle per decade doc, starting with `ocx account list|current|use` reusing the existing management API (GET/PUT /api/codex-auth/accounts|active, GET/PUT /api/oauth/accounts*, GET/PUT /api/providers/keys*): masked credential output only, --json support, non-zero exit codes on unknown provider/account-id, runtime port auto-resolution like `ocx status`, and CLI-reference + providers docs updates. Change scope: src/cli/*, src/server/management-api.ts only if a missing contract is truly required, tests/*, docs-site CLI/providers docs, the devlog unit, .codexclaw goalplan. OUT OF SCOPE: the other session's staged Qwen/base-url provider work currently in the git index (never stage/commit those paths - use pathspec-scoped commits only), GUI code changes, new auth protocols, git push (NOT approved), release. Acceptance (DONE): every goalplan criterion carries fresh capturedEvidence - (a) survey matrix doc enumerating all GUI features with CLI coverage status; (b) decade docs at diff-level precision passing a sol adversarial audit (LEXICO-SPLIT-01/DIFFLEVEL-ROADMAP-01); (c) each implemented CLI command verified by fresh build/test output plus real invocation evidence against a live local proxy including --json and error exit-code cases; (d) docs updated; (e) no raw tokens/keys ever printed (adversarial check). Terminal outcomes: DONE on verified criteria; NOOP only for a slice already satisfying every criterion; BLOCKED for missing API contracts; UNSAFE for any raw-secret exposure path; NEEDS_HUMAN for irreducible product intent; BUDGET_EXHAUSTED only at stated bounds. Resource bounds: ~3h active loop wall-clock; at most 4 concurrent subagents; zero paid external calls; commits local-only. First work-phase: docs-only PABCD cycle producing the survey + diff-level decade roadmap, then implementation cycles per the locked map." criteria=0
